'''zadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadside|roadside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadside|roadside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zadhaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædhækæth|zædhækæth]] || [[word:zædhækæj|zædhækæj]] || [[word:zædhækæsh|zædhækæsh]] || [[word:zædhækæ|zædhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadhadhakath|zadhadhakath]] || [[word:zadhadhakaj|zadhadhakaj]] || [[word:zadhadhakash|zadhadhakash]] || [[word:zadhadhaka|zadhadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadhakath|zadhakath]] || [[word:zadhakaj|zadhakaj]] || [[word:zadhakash|zadhakash]] || [[word:zadhaka|zadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadhafkath|zadhafkath]] || [[word:zadhafkaj|zadhafkaj]] || [[word:zadhafkash|zadhafkash]] || [[word:zadhafkaf|zadhafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadhakatha|zadhakatha]] || [[word:zadhakaja|zadhakaja]] || [[word:zadhakasha|zadhakasha]] || [[word:zadhakaka|zadhakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadhakath|zadhakath]] || [[word:zadhakaj|zadhakaj]] || [[word:zadhakash|zadhakash]] || [[word:zadhaka|zadhaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadhakathal|zadhakathal]] || [[word:zadhakajal|zadhakajal]] || [[word:zadhakashal|zadhakashal]] || [[word:zadhakakal|zadhakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadhakathatha|zadhakathatha]] || [[word:zadhakajaja|zadhakajaja]] || [[word:zadhakashasha|zadhakashasha]] || [[word:zadhakaka|zadhakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadhakathan|zadhakathan]] || [[word:zadhakajan|zadhakajan]] || [[word:zadhakashan|zadhakashan]] || [[word:zadhakakan|zadhakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadhakathaoro|zadhakathaoro]] || [[word:zadhakajaoro|zadhakajaoro]] || [[word:zadhakashaoro|zadhakashaoro]] || [[word:zadhakakaoro|zadhakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
